UART Status

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x7c
Size:
0x4
Source:
uart_rf.rdl

Description

Read-only register indicating the operational state of the UART and FIFO fill levels.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:5] reserved rw 0x0 -
[4] rff r 0x0 RFF
[3] rfne r 0x0 RFNE
[2] tfe r 0x1 TFE
[1] tfnf r 0x1 TFNF
[0] busy r 0x0 BUSY

Field Descriptions

rff - RFF

Receive FIFO Full. 1=RX FIFO completely full.

rfne - RFNE

Receive FIFO Not Empty. 1=RX FIFO contains at least one entry.

tfe - TFE

Transmit FIFO Empty. 1=TX FIFO completely empty.

tfnf - TFNF

Transmit FIFO Not Full. 1=TX FIFO is not full.

busy - BUSY

UART Busy. 1=serial transfer in progress.
